title: Vines & Leaves Add-ons
description: An add-on that adds compatibility with some mods using the Vines & Leaves texture
body:
**Vines & Leaves Addon** (_Compat with Mods_)

A "simple" addon for the Vines & Leaves texture, adds compatibility for some mods, if you want any other type of compatibility, just call me on Discord.

![The image shows the texture working on Curios and Trinkets.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1bec1c980e771337f0dafb993bad05977aa34c74.png)



The default [Vines & Leaves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/vines-leaves-gui) texture is required for it to work.
